---
title: "Untitled"
---

```{r}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
kaudulla_climate_monthly_clean <- read_csv("kaudulla_climate_monthly_clean.csv")

env_data <- kaudulla_climate_monthly_clean |>
  mutate(
    year = factor(year),

    month_name = factor(
      month_name,
      levels = c(
        "Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr",
        "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug",
        "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"
      ),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )


library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)

env_data2 <- env_data |>
   filter(year %in% c("2023", "2024", "2025"))

make_heatmap <- function(df, var_name, title) {

  p <- ggplot(
    df,
    aes(
      x = month_name,
      y = year,
      fill = .data[[var_name]]
    )
  ) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c() +
    labs(title = title, x = "Month", y = "Year") +
    theme_minimal()

  ggplotly(p)
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false


p_solar <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "solar_radiation", "Solar Radiation")
p_cloud <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "cloud_amount", "Cloud Amount")
p_soil <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "soil_wetness", "Soil Wetness")
p_rain <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "rainfall", "Rainfall")
p_pressure <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "pressure", "Pressure")
p_temp <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "temp_max", "Max Temperature")
p_temp_skin <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "temp_skin", "Skin Temperature")
p_wind <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "wind_speed_max", "Wind Speed")
p_wind_corrected <- make_heatmap(env_data2, "wind_speed_corrected", "Corrected Wind Speed")

library(plotly)



 library(crosstalk)
library(plotly)
library(htmltools)

    p_solar
    p_cloud
    p_soil
    p_rain
    p_pressure
    p_temp
    p_temp_skin
    p_wind
    p_wind_corrected




```

```{r}

```
